name: Soft Sugar Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the vegetable shortening and 1 1/2 cups of sugar until fluffy.
2. Beat in the eggs one at a time, then stir in the vanilla extract.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
4. Alternately add the dry ingredients and buttermilk to the creamed mixture, mixing gently after each addition.
5. Drop by heaping teaspoonfuls onto ungreased or parchment-lined baking sheets.
6. Bake in a preheated 375°F (190°C) oven for 12-15 minutes, or until the bottoms are lightly browned and the tops are still light.
7. Allow cookies to cool on a wire rack for a few minutes before sprinkling with granulated sugar.
